title: Post-Quantum Cryptography and Hybrid Migration · Go Retrieval
summary: A delayed security review reconstructs post-quantum cryptography and hybrid migration from threat, algorithm, parameter, implementation, key-custody, failure, test-vector, operations, and stakeholder evidence, then challenges one retained misconception. Planned artifact: Extend the evidence record for post-quantum inventory and hybrid migration plan after a delayed changed case. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Inventory long-lived confidentiality, authentication, signatures, roots, protocols, dependencies, data lifetime, and migration lead time.
Use Go ML-KEM interfaces for key encapsulation with strict key/ciphertext parsing, shared-key custody, failure handling, and hybrid context.
Use Go ML-DSA parameter sets and context-aware signing with explicit key, signature-size, interoperability, and policy tradeoffs.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

steps.title: Cryptography and Go Separate evidence from confidence · Review Crypto Go Hybrid Pq Migration
steps.instruction:
review case — A review cryptographic engineering team handles case 8944 during a credential migration window. Build deterministic Go evidence to gate hybrid ML-KEM and ML-DSA migration on inventory, specified combiner, transcript binding, downgrade defense, and rollback; keep browser execution deterministic and move production entropy, native timing, non-allowlisted crypto, network, HSM, and compliance claims to authorized transfer gates; then rotate the active key while old data remains readable and new writes cannot downgrade. Browser code uses pure state models or the narrow side-effect-free crypto allowlist with fixed fixtures. Production entropy and keys, secret custody, native timing and side channels, networks, TLS, HSM/KMS, certificate systems, FIPS or compliance state, load, faults, restore, and production behavior require explicit authorized transfer gates. Competency probe: Design hybrid classical-plus-post-quantum rollout, transcript binding, downgrade defense, telemetry, compatibility, rollback, and cryptographic agility.

Inspect the Crypto Go Hybrid Pq Migration trace for this review case. Which record connects a precondition, observed state change, and boundary result?

Evidence target: Cryptography and Go Separate evidence from confidence · Review Crypto Go Hybrid Pq Migration.
steps.why: The decision supplies observable evidence for design hybrid classical-plus-post-quantum rollout, transcript binding, downgrade defense, telemetry, compatibility, rollback, and cryptographic agility. For Cryptography and Go Separate evidence from confidence · Review Crypto Go Hybrid Pq Migration, keep Crypto Go Hybrid Pq Migration connected to executable Go behavior evidence.
